response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for the song '冥界Halloween Night!'. I am including subtitles for the merchandise introduction and song announcement in the first 50 seconds, followed by the song performance. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and I have ensured that splitting occurs at natural pauses to maintain semantic continuity and readability.

subtitles.original: カバンにつけるもよし
subtitles.english: You can attach it to your bag,

subtitles.original: ペンライトにつけるもよしと
多機能なリボンチャームとなっておりますので
subtitles.english: Since it's a multi-functional ribbon charm,

subtitles.original: 皆様の推し活とやらに是非ご活用ください
subtitles.english: please use it for your fan activities!

subtitles.original: 最後は特典のおしらせです
subtitles.english: Finally, here is an announcement about the bonuses.

subtitles.original: フルセットご購入の方全員に
subtitles.english: To everyone who purchases the full set,

subtitles.original: チェキ風ブロマイドカードを１つお付けいたします
subtitles.english: we'll include one cheki-style bromide card.

subtitles.original: 複製サインと国王からのメッセージもあるそうですよ
subtitles.english: It also has a printed signature and a message from the King!

subtitles.original: 数量限定版は直筆サイン入りですので
subtitles.english: The limited edition version is hand-signed,

subtitles.original: 皆様お早めに
以上、今回のお土産品紹介でした
subtitles.english: That's all for the merchandise introduction.

subtitles.original: さて、このあとは冥界の女王様をイメージした楽曲
subtitles.english: Now, next is a song inspired by the Queen of the Underworld,

subtitles.original: 冥界Halloween Night!のお披露目です
楽しんだ後は無事王国へお帰りくださいね
subtitles.english: After enjoying it, please return safely to the Kingdom.

subtitles.original: それでは
Welcome！さあ、踊ろうよ
This is Halloween Night！
冥界を挙げてのParty (Party)
ルール違反はダメですWarning (Warning)
subtitles.english: Rule violations are not allowed, Warning (Warning)

subtitles.original: 説明は一度きり (きり)
聞き逃せばあの世行き！
subtitles.english: If you miss it, you're going to the other world!

subtitles.original: 冗談です
(いち) お菓子を持って
(に) 仮装して盛って
(さん) 生者か死者かは隠す事
subtitles.english: (Three) Hide whether you're living or dead

subtitles.original: それと…
(よん！) いつだって笑顔で
油断気満々で
subtitles.english: With a free and easy attitude

subtitles.original: 最後の最後はご無事で帰る事
subtitles.english: In the very end, return safely

subtitles.original: 一人きりじゃつまらないわ
subtitles.english: It's no fun being all alone

subtitles.original: この退屈な王城の玉座で
subtitles.english: On the throne of this boring royal castle

subtitles.original: 幾許（いくばく）ずっと待ちわびてた
人恋しいとか？
ヤダ！そんなんじゃないってば！
subtitles.english: No way! That's not it at all!

subtitles.original: 『Let's冥界Halloween Night！』
Dancing！Dancing！闇夜にハッピーなメロデイー
subtitles.english: Dancing! Dancing! A happy melody in the dark night

subtitles.original: ラッタッタ ラッタッタ 冥界Halloween Night！
Swinging！Swinging！ゾッとして愉快なアイロニー
subtitles.english: Swinging! Swinging! A thrilling, pleasant irony

subtitles.original: ラッタッタ ラッタッタ 狂宴のショータイム！

響く雅なTuning (Tuning)
